hero.subtitle: Explore the untamed beauty of Algeria. From snow-capped 2,000m summits to ancient Tassili rock art trails — your expedition starts here.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Where do you want to hike?

trekTypes.heading: TREK YOUR WAY
trekTypes.desc: We categorize our expeditions by terrain and intensity. Whether you're a ridge scrambler or a desert wanderer, your path is here.

about.label: THE TEHWISSA 213 LEGACY
about.desc: Tehwissa 213 isn't just a booking platform — we are a community of mountain lovers and professional alpinists. Since 2009, we've guided over 12,000 adventurers through the most rigorous and rewarding terrains of Algeria.

why.safety_desc: Certified first-aid guides and satellite GPS tracking on every mountain expedition.
why.guides_desc: Guides who were born in these mountains and know every hidden trail and cave.
why.eco_desc: Strict 'Leave No Trace' policy. We protect the nature we love to explore.
why.photo_desc: Our guides help you capture the most stunning viewpoints at the golden hour.

contact.label: Basecamp Contact
contact.desc: Don't just dream of the views — stand in them. Our experts are ready to design your ideal route today.
